title: task
description: chaos.py:147 - LossRule caches loss decisions per tx_id in _loss_cache dict to ensure consistent behavior on repeated polls. But this cache is never cleared. Over long simulations with many transmissions, memory grows unboundedly. Failure: Memory exhaustion in long-running simulations.
close_reason: Already fixed by tkze: LossRule._loss_cache now uses OrderedDict with max_cache_size=1024 and LRU eviction (lines 118-119, 154-155). Memory is bounded.
